hero.headline: Transform Your Home with Expert Painters in Dallas
hero.subheadline: Over 35 years of flawless finishes, on-time projects, and exceptional customer service.

featureSections.title: Flawless Walls, Ceilings & Trim
featureSections.body: Our interior painting service brings new life to your home. We meticulously prep every surface, use premium paints, and deliver crisp lines and even coverage. From accent walls to full-home makeovers, we treat your space with care.
bullets: Low-VOC paints for safe indoor air quality
featureSections.cardBody: Revitalize your kitchen or bathroom with durable, factory-like cabinet painting. Our spray finish is smooth and long-lasting.

featureSections.title: Curb Appeal That Lasts
featureSections.body: Boost your home's value and protect it from Texas weather. We use weather-resistant paints and proper surface preparation to ensure your exterior stays vibrant for years.
featureSections.cardBody: Minimize downtime with our efficient commercial painting crews. Offices, retail, and HOA buildings done right.

whyChooseUs.title: Locally Owned & Operated
whyChooseUs.description: We're your neighbors in Dallas, not a franchise. Our reputation matters here, and we stand behind every job.

whyChooseUs.title: Premium Materials
whyChooseUs.description: We use Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore paints for superior coverage, durability, and color retention.

whyChooseUs.title: Clean & Respectful Crews
whyChooseUs.description: Our painters are trained, uniformed, and respectful of your home. We clean up daily and leave no mess behind.

whyChooseUs.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
whyChooseUs.description: If you're not happy, we make it right. Our 100% satisfaction guarantee gives you peace of mind.

testimonials.quote: James House Paint transformed our living room with a beautiful accent wall. The crew was punctual, tidy, and the color match was perfect.
testimonials.author: Laura M.

testimonials.quote: We hired them to paint our entire house exterior. They power washed, scraped, and painted in just three days. The results are stunning.
testimonials.author: Tom R.

testimonials.quote: Professional from start to finish. The estimate was detailed, the timeline was accurate, and the final product exceeded expectations.
testimonials.author: Angela K.

cta.headline: Ready to Refresh Your Home?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your free, no-obligation estimate today.

servicesPage.intro: From single rooms to whole-home transformations, James House Paint Inc offers comprehensive painting services in Dallas. Our skilled team uses premium materials and proven techniques to deliver beautiful, lasting results.

services.title: Interior Painting
services.shortDescription: Expert interior painting for walls, ceilings, trim, and more.
services.longDescription: Our interior painting service is designed to minimize disruption while maximizing quality. We protect your floors and furniture, patch holes, sand smooth, and apply two coats of premium paint for a flawless finish. Choose from thousands of colors.
benefits: Low-VOC paints safe for family and pets
Minimal mess with drop cloths and tape
Fast turnaround – most rooms done in a day

process.title: Consultation & Estimate
process.description: We visit your home, discuss your vision, measure the space, and provide a detailed written quote.

process.title: Preparation
process.description: We move furniture, cover floors, patch imperfections, and tape edges for perfect lines.

process.title: Painting & Cleanup
process.description: Our painters apply primer and two coats of paint, then remove all coverings and leave your home spotless.

faqs.question: How long does interior paint last?
faqs.answer: With proper preparation and quality paint, interior paint can last 5-10 years depending on wear and sunlight.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during painting?
faqs.answer: Not necessarily. We can coordinate key access or work around your schedule. Many clients provide a key and trust our crew.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.shortDescription: Weather-resistant exterior painting to protect and beautify your home.
services.longDescription: Dallas weather can be tough on paint. Our exterior service includes thorough power washing, scraping loose paint, caulking gaps, and applying high-quality exterior paint that resists fading, peeling, and moisture.
benefits: Protects against sun, rain, and humidity
Enhances curb appeal and home value

process.title: Inspection & Power Washing
process.description: We inspect surfaces for damage, then power wash to remove dirt and old paint.

process.title: Repairs & Priming
process.description: We scrape, sand, caulk, and prime bare wood or metal to ensure adhesion.

process.title: Painting & Final Walk
process.description: We apply two coats of premium exterior paint, then walk the property with you to ensure satisfaction.

faqs.question: How often should I paint my house exterior?
faqs.answer: Every 5-7 years for wood or stucco, and 10+ years for brick or fiber cement. We'll advise based on your home's condition.

faqs.question: Do you paint in winter?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work year-round as long as temperatures stay above 35°F. We use paints formulated for cooler conditions.

services.title: Cabinet Painting
services.shortDescription: Spray-finish cabinet painting for a factory-quality look.
services.longDescription: Give your kitchen or bathroom a stunning makeover without the cost of replacement. Our cabinet painting process includes thorough degreasing, sanding, priming, and spraying with durable cabinet-grade paint for a smooth, hard finish.
benefits: Wide range of colors and sheens

process.title: Removal & Cleaning
process.description: We remove doors, drawers, and hardware, then clean all surfaces with degreaser.

process.title: Sanding & Priming
process.description: We sand to create a smooth base, apply primer, and sand again for a flawless surface.

process.title: Spraying & Reassembly
process.description: We spray multiple thin coats of paint, then reinstall doors and hardware with precision alignment.

faqs.question: Can you match existing cabinet colors?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We can color-match any sample or provide custom colors. We also offer popular shades like white, gray, and navy.

faqs.question: How long does cabinet paint last?
faqs.answer: With proper prep and quality paint, cabinet finishes last 5-10 years. We use a catalyzed urethane for extra durability.

services.title: Commercial Painting
services.shortDescription: Efficient painting for offices, retail, HOA common areas, and more.
services.longDescription: Our commercial painting team works around your business hours to minimize disruption. We handle everything from small offices to large multi-unit properties, using low-odor paints and efficient processes.

process.title: Site Assessment
process.description: We evaluate the space, discuss your timeline, and provide a written proposal.

process.title: Preparation & Protection
process.description: We cover furniture, floors, and equipment, then prep surfaces as needed.

process.title: Painting & Final Inspection
process.description: We paint efficiently, clean up thoroughly, and do a final walk-through with you.

faqs.question: Do you work on weekends or nights?
faqs.answer: Yes, we schedule work outside business hours to avoid disrupting your operations.

faqs.question: What type of paint do you use for commercial spaces?
faqs.answer: We use commercial-grade paints that are scrubbable, low-VOC, and durable for high-traffic areas.

about.headline: Over 35 Years of Painting Excellence in Dallas
about.mission: To deliver beautiful, durable paint finishes with exceptional customer service, treating every home as if it were our own.
story: James House Paint Inc was founded in 1985 by James House, a Dallas native with a passion for craftsmanship. Starting as a one-man operation, James built a reputation for meticulous attention to detail and honest pricing. Over the decades, the company grew into a trusted name in the Dallas painting industry, serving thousands of homeowners and businesses.

Today, we remain family-owned and operated, with a dedicated team of skilled painters who share James's commitment to quality. We invest in training, premium materials, and modern techniques to ensure every project exceeds expectations. From historic homes in Lakewood to modern condos in Uptown, we treat each job with pride.

coreValues.title: Quality Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We never cut corners. Every surface is properly prepped and painted with care.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest estimates, transparent communication, and standing behind our work.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and time with respect – punctual, clean, and courteous.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to be a local business supporting Dallas families and neighborhoods.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Painting Estimate
contact.subheadline: Tell us about your project and we'll provide a detailed, no-obligation quote within 24 hours.
